title: Create: Cheese Factory
description: Build your own cheese factory with Create.
body:
About

Create: Cheese Factory adds 30 new food items with recipes that use Create's mechanisms and processing, allowing you to build your own cheese factory!

Content

Cheese Curds and Soft Curd Cheese, made by heating Milk in Create's Basin

The Cheese Cellar: A fully automatable workstation for maturing your fresh cheese

Adjust the maturing time using Calendar Pages and get different outputs!

30 new food items, including well-known cheeses from all around the world

Many other features and Create interractions to discover!

Item list

Screenshots

Tools for modpacks

You can add vanilla or modded items as possible outputs from the Cheese Cellar, using item tags:

• Maturing Tier I (300 ticks): ageing_tier_1
• Maturing Tier II (600 ticks): ageing_tier_2
• Maturing Tier III (900 ticks): ageing_tier_3

Structure is as follows: create_cheese:{tag}

Credits

Huge thanks to @pixerelia for letting me use their work for the textures.

Show spoiler

[authorization]

Dependencies

This mod requires Create for all of the features to work, but can technically be played without.

JEI is recommended for recipes but not required.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the Modrinth launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
